description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jjatria/cpran:latest Docker image and set the CPRAN_PREF_DIR variable to /builds/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE. Include a before_script that runs cpanm --local-lib=~/perl5 local::lib && eval $(perl -I ~/perl5/lib/perl5/ -Mlocal::lib), then cpanm JSON Path::Class YAML::XS Try::Tiny File::HomeDir Readonly, then cpran init --notest --reinstall, cpran update, and cpran deps | cpran --yes install --notest -. Define a job named Praat (default test stage) that executes the script prove -v --exec "praat --ansi --pref-dir=$CPRAN_PREF_DIR --run" and runs on runners tagged cpran.
